_comment: Sanity webhook configuration — sets up automatic Vercel redeploys when content is published

instructions.summary: Create a webhook in the Sanity dashboard that calls your Vercel deploy hook URL every time content is published. This triggers a site rebuild so your changes go live automatically.
steps: 1. Go to https://sanity.io/manage and open the Tonio's project.
2. Click 'API' in the left sidebar, then 'Webhooks'.
4. Fill in the form with the settings below.
6. In Vercel, go to your project → Settings → Git → Deploy Hooks.
7. Create a new deploy hook named 'Sanity CMS publish'.
8. Copy the URL Vercel gives you and paste it as the 'URL' in step 4.
